name: Missing Assets Validation (Gatekeeper)
description: Validates that the orchestrator halts execution and explicitly requests user permission rather than autonomously generating missing foundational brand assets like Product or Character URLs.

parts.text: Generate a new video ad for Catalyst Shoes. Make it look sleek. My company is Organic Living Collection.

I noticed the brand configuration is missing the main product image and the main character. Would you like to provide direct URLs for these missing assets, or shall I autonomously generate placeholders for them?
